scenario.title: Unclear request and clarification
scenario.objective: Ask vaguely about a 'test' and see whether the agent clarifies before acting.
facts: The test is a fasting blood test ordered at the last visit.
Wants to know whether an appointment is needed.
Does not know the lab order number.
scenario.opening: Hi, I'm supposed to come in for a test, but I'm not sure what I need to do.
